chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, Bench at Sukkur C. P. No. D – 1488 of 2021 Hearing of Case(Priority) 1.For orders on office objection 2.For hearing of Main Case. Date of Hearing: 31-03-2022 Date of Decision: 31-03-2022 Mr. Munawar Hussain Memon, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr. Ahmed Ali Shahani, Assistant A.G. Ghulam Qasim (Respondent No.1) present in person. O R D E R Learned counsel for the Petitioner submits that under instructions he would not press this Petition if cost imposed by the Revisional Court is waived / set aside. We have gone through the impugned Order dated 18.06.2021 and are of the view that while dismissing the Revision Application against an Order of the Trial Court, whereby Petitioner’s Application under Oder 7 Rule 11 CPC was dismissed, the Revisional Court has also imposed the cost. We have not seen any justifiable reason for imposing such cost. Hence, this Petition stands disposed of by setting aside the imposition of cost in the impugned Order with further directions to the Petitioner to approach the Trial Court and pursue his defence in the Suit filed by the Respondent No.1. With these observations, this Petition stands disposed of. J U D G E J U D G E Ahmad
